samples.name: spring-boot-channels-chat
samples.description: Omnichannel AI chat — same @AiEndpoint on Web, Telegram, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp, Messenger

envVars.LLM_API_KEY: API key for your LLM provider (optional — demo mode without)
envVars.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET: Any random string for webhook verification
envVars.WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET: Meta app secret for signature verification
envVars.MESSENGER_APP_SECRET: Meta app secret for signature verification
